name: Tomato Butter--(sherilyn's)
recipeIngredient: 10 Lbs Ripe Red Tomatoes, or 6 Quarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the tomatoes and chop into large pieces.
2. Cover the chopped tomatoes with vinegar and let stand for 8 hours or overnight, ensuring it is well drained.
3. Add all other ingredients to the drained tomatoes.
4. Cook slowly in a large pot (or crockpot) until very thick, approximately 4 hours or longer if using a crockpot.
5. If the mixture is not thickening sufficiently, add Certo and continue stirring and cooking for an additional 10 minutes or so.
6. Yield: 3 Quarts. Note: A little goes a long way because it is quite spicy.
